C/C FOR ESTTLEMENT CONF. IN DEPT. 503B. WILLIAM PEAVEY, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. NO REPORTER. PARTIES PRESENT: PHILIP MATSUMOTO, ATTY. FOR PLTF. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF S.F. AND DEFT, PRO PER, TYRONE BLAKE. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TO JURY TRIAL 10/30/00.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 305

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT. 305, PALVARADO, JUDGE; GCHUCK, CLERK; RBALIAN, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY PMATSUMOTO, DEF TYRONE BLAKE APPR IN PRO PER. WIT SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. ARGUED AND SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION IF TYRONE BLAKE PAYS $885 TO SF HOUSING AUTH. BY 1 DEC 00 HE RETAINS POSSESSION OF 1778 - 15TH ST. #158, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. IF NOT PAID, SF HOUSING AUTH. SHALL HAVE POSSESSION AND DAMAGES OF $885. SF HOUSING TO CORRECT DEFECTS CONSTITUTING BREACH OF WARRANTY AS SPECIFIED. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION THEREON.
